metadata.name: Detect Field Change Using Satellite Imagery

description: An agronomist wants to compare satellite imagery from two different dates to see where a field has been tilled.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve satellite images of the field from before and after the suspected tillage date.
Run a change detection analysis on the two images.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis highlights the areas of the field where the soil has been disturbed.

nodes.task_description: Generate a map showing only the areas that have changed (i.e., the tilled portions).

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a map that clearly visualizes the tilled area.
